title: NotOptedInExternalDocsSlice
description: Phase-2 closed shape for the external_docs probe (Layer D). The probe is registered as a Null Object stub per final-design.md Open Q 4 — the opted-in allowlist schema lands when the first real user opts in. `opted_in` is the discriminator key for the eventual tagged union (Annotated[NotOptedInExternalDocsSlice | OptedInExternalDocsSlice, Field(discriminator='opted_in')]). Generated from src/codegenie/probes/layer_d/external_docs.py::NotOptedInExternalDocsSlice (Pydantic model is the source of truth).

opted_in.description: Discriminator key. Phase 2 pins this to false; the opted-in variant will land as a new sibling model with opted_in: true.

reason.description: Why the probe emitted the not-opted-in slice. Single-variant in Phase 2; widens to a typed union if other not-opted-in reasons emerge.
